Title: Great mutual fund app
Review: I love how easy it is to invest in mutual funds through GROWW. The SIP setup is seamless.

Title: Good but KYC is slow
Review: Overall good experience but KYC verification took 3 days. Would appreciate faster processing.

Title: Payment keeps failing
Review: Every time I try to make a payment, it fails at the last step. Very frustrating experience.

Title: Cannot withdraw funds
Review: I have been trying to withdraw my money for two weeks and the request is stuck in pending state.

Title: App crashes on statements
Review: The app crashes whenever I try to view my statement for the previous month.

Title: Very smooth onboarding
Review: Onboarding was very easy. Completed KYC within minutes and started investing the same day.

Title: Nice UI
Review: Clean interface and easy navigation. The portfolio view is especially useful.

Title: KYC rejected without reason
Review: My KYC was rejected but I received no explanation. Support took 5 days to respond.

Title: Money stuck for 10 days
Review: Requested a withdrawal 10 days ago. Money is still not in my bank. No update from support.

Title: Payment UPI issues
Review: UPI payments sometimes fail on the first attempt. Second attempt usually works but it is annoying.

Title: Best SIP app
Review: The SIP reminders and auto-invest feature are excellent. Makes investing effortless.

Title: Good returns
Review: Portfolio performance is good. Wish there were more filtering options for fund selection.

Title: Statement download broken
Review: The PDF statement download has not worked for the past two weeks. Button does nothing.

Title: Withdrawal delay again
Review: Another week and withdrawal still pending. This is unacceptable for a fintech app.

Title: Onboarding could be simpler
Review: Too many steps during onboarding. Had to re-upload documents twice due to unclear instructions.
